title: Metadata extraction
description: Need a simple report list or full data lineage from database to report field? We deliver the information in a clean, usable format.

title: Tools for development
description: Eliminate repetitive manual work. Automate universe and report tasks to speed up development, reduce errors, and free your team for higher-value work.

title: Test automation
description: Database or universe changes can break many reports. Automatic report testing catches issues early, so you can fix them before users notice.
